props.text: Stay on top of AI/crypto/markets daily: Morning briefs, token alerts (x2 each day), DeFi overview, Polymarket digest, paper digest, research brief — full coverage 2026-04-06 & 04-07
Build knowledge base: 4 articles written in 2 days (AI agents, Hormuz, research brief, paper digest); memory topics created (markets.md, market-monitoring.md); memory consolidated x4
Monitor DeFi & anomalies: Token alerts active daily; BULLA +58%, NOM +26%, RED +18% flagged today; TRU pump-dump reversal (-20%) confirmed; WTI Oil at $114-115/bbl 🚨
Watch Iran-US / Hormuz: Ceasefire deadline passed tonight (rejected); US forces enter Iran YES 99.65%; WTI elevated +3% vs yesterday; covered in polymarket + article + token alert
CPI 2026-04-10: On watch — 3 days out, flagged in all recent logs
Wire cron schedule to aeon.yml: Last flagged 2026-04-06 (18 days since prior active period); still no PR opened; agent is entirely dispatch-driven — NOT autonomous
Guard idea-capture against empty var: Identified 2026-04-06 (ran twice with empty var), no fix applied
Add heartbeat / morning-brief dedup: Identified 2026-04-06 (heartbeat x9 on 4/6, x7 on 4/7), no fix applied
HYPE unlock follow-up: Unlocked 2026-04-06 ($354M); HYPE down 3.7% today (in line with broad market); no deeper analysis article written
Capture first idea via Telegram: Needs Nobu to send an idea via Telegram — idea-capture ran twice empty on 4/6, never received input
Add weekly-review + rss-digest to cron: Blocked on cron scheduler PR (see Stalled above)
